title: JWT Builder
description: Sign HS256 / HS384 / HS512 JWTs locally with WebCrypto: custom payload & header, UTF-8 / Base64 secrets, plus signature verification.

notice.title: Secrets never leave the browser — still, use test keys only
notice.body: Signing and verification run locally via WebCrypto with zero upload; even so, never paste production secrets into any web page.

sign.heading: Sign
sign.headerExtra: Extra header fields (optional; alg/typ are protected)
sign.empty: The signed token appears here with three color-coded segments.
sign.legend: red = header · violet = payload · blue = signature

verify.heading: Verify
verify.tokenPlaceholder: Paste a JWT to verify (HS256/384/512 only)
verify.invalid: Signature invalid — wrong secret or tampered token.

error.payload_must_be_object: Payload must be a JSON object (not an array or scalar).
error.headerMustBeObject: Extra header fields must be a JSON object.
error.bad_secret_encoding: Secret failed to decode with the selected encoding (check Base64 characters).
error.malformed_token: Token is not in xxx.yyy.zzz form.
error.unsupported_alg: Only HS256 / HS384 / HS512 are supported (alg=none and RS/ES are rejected).
